_comment: Controls who can query which client's campaign data via Slack. Admins can query any client.

_notes.admins: Slack usernames who can query ANY client account
_notes.client_access: Map of Google Ads customer_id → list of Slack users allowed to query it. Use '*' for open access within the team.
_notes.why: Prevents someone on Client A's team from accidentally seeing Client B's campaign data
